episodes.summary: Margaret pushed her team hard on jalapeño corn dog bites, demanding they respect the craft over nostalgia. When Marcus understood her vision, she finally trusted the work enough to stop tinkering and let it breathe.
episodes.key_moment: When Marcus understood her vision, she finally trusted the work enough to stop tinkering and let it breathe.

episodes.summary: Margaret spent the week perfecting mini shepherd's pies with her team, pushing back against unnecessary flourishes. She clashed with colleagues over flowery descriptions but respected their commitment when they delivered clean, honest work.
episodes.key_moment: She clashed with colleagues over flowery descriptions but respected their commitment when they delivered clean, honest work.

episodes.summary: Margaret spent the week perfecting brown butter pecan tassies, wrestling with pastry ratios while pushing back against over-explaining the work. She finally convinced her team to let the lamination speak for itself instead of drowning it in instructions.
episodes.key_moment: She finally convinced her team to let the lamination speak for itself instead of drowning it in instructions.
